explanations.pt-br: Fluxo padrão do ecossistema Hugging Face: tokenizer e modelo carregados a partir do mesmo identificador.
explanations.en-us: Standard Hugging Face flow: tokenizer and model are loaded from the same identifier.

explanations.pt-br: `device_map='auto'` pede ao accelerate para repartir o modelo entre GPU e CPU, respeitando os limites de memória.
explanations.en-us: `device_map='auto'` asks accelerate to split the model across GPU and CPU while respecting memory limits.

explanations.pt-br: `torch_dtype='auto'` reaproveita o dtype recomendado pelo checkpoint.
explanations.en-us: `torch_dtype='auto'` reuses the dtype recommended by the checkpoint.
